Description: A 39-story luxury condominium tower on the Williamsburg waterfront, anchoring the Domino Sugar Factory redevelopment with residences designed by Selldorf Architects for Two Trees.
DescriptionLong: One Domino Square is a porcelain-clad residential development on the Williamsburg waterfront in Brooklyn, rising at the foot of the Williamsburg Bridge on the historic Domino Sugar Refinery site. Developed by Two Trees Management as the final residential phase of its Domino master plan and designed by Selldorf Architects — Annabelle Selldorf's first residential skyscraper — it pairs a 39-story condominium tower of 160 homes with a companion 55-story rental tower, the tallest building in Williamsburg. The shimmering iridescent porcelain-tile facade shifts in appearance with the light. Residents enjoy luxury amenities and sweeping East River and Manhattan skyline views, set beside the landscaped Domino Square public plaza.

StatusHistory.note: Two Trees begins the final Domino tower (346 Kent Ave / One Domino Square) on the Williamsburg waterfront
Completed/opened Oct 2024 — rentals leased, condos closing; correct over-stated "Under Construction" to open
Condo sales launched from $1.25M

Title: Four Seasons Private Residences Cherry Creek
Description: A proposed eight-story Four Seasons-branded luxury condominium on Detroit Street in Denver's Cherry Creek North, with roughly 41 for-sale residences over ground-floor retail.
DescriptionLong: Four Seasons Private Residences Cherry Creek is a proposed eight-story branded condominium spanning the Detroit Street block in Denver's upscale Cherry Creek North district, replacing a stretch of low-rise retail. The plan calls for approximately 41 for-sale residences on the upper floors atop a ground level activated by a residential lobby and curated retail, with two levels of underground parking accessed from the alley. Top-floor shared amenities include a pool and fitness center, and the refined design emphasizes generous balconies, large windows for daylight, and a façade palette of natural stone, wood-tone cladding, architectural concrete panels, and aluminum composite materials. Led by Dallas-based Stillwater Capital with Wexford Real Estate Investors and local partners Brue Baukol Capital Partners and Zabel Investment Company, it would become Denver's second Four Seasons-branded residential address.
Developer: Stillwater Capital, Wexford Real Estate Investors, Brue Baukol Capital Partners, Zabel Investment Company

StatusHistory.note: Four Seasons-branded condo plans filed for Detroit St, Cherry Creek North (Stillwater Capital/Wexford), 2026-02

Title: Waldorf Astoria Residences Denver Cherry Creek
Description: Colorado's first Waldorf Astoria-branded residences, a boutique luxury condominium in Denver's Cherry Creek North managed by Hilton, with a signature street-level restaurant and rooftop amenities.
DescriptionLong: Waldorf Astoria Residences Denver Cherry Creek is the Waldorf Astoria brand's residential debut in Colorado, a boutique collection of 37 luxury condominiums in the heart of Cherry Creek North. Concept design is led by Denver-based Shears Adkins Rockmore in collaboration with architect Carlos Ott, with interiors by BAMO. Residences range from roughly 1,350 to over 4,300 square feet and feature custom Boffi kitchens with Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances, Italian vanities with Waterworks fixtures, custom closets, smart-home technology, semi-private elevators, and private balconies framing mountain and downtown views, topped by penthouses. Amenities include a Peacock Alley-inspired lounge, a resort-style rooftop pool with bar and lounge, a wellness center with sauna and steam rooms, a fitness and movement studio, a porte-cochère arrival lobby, and underground parking with EV charging, alongside a signature street-level restaurant — all professionally managed by Hilton.
Architect: Shears Adkins Rockmore, Carlos Ott, BAMO

StatusHistory.note: First-ever Waldorf Astoria Residences announced for Cherry Creek North (PMG), 2024-07
$107.5M construction loan from Maxim Capital Group closed for Waldorf Astoria Residences, 2025-08
PMG breaks ground on Waldorf Astoria Residences Cherry Creek with ~65% of condos pre-sold, 2025-11-19

Title: Kahuina
Description: A master-planned luxury condominium community in Honolulu's Our Kakaʻako district, anchored by a roughly 43-story tower and blending market-rate with income-qualified residences.
DescriptionLong: Developed by Stanford Carr Development with landowner Kamehameha Schools, Kahuina — Hawaiian for "crossroads" — rises at the meeting point of Cooke, Coral, Auahi, and Pohukaina Streets in the heart of Our Kakaʻako. The roughly 3.66-acre community comprises two towers, the taller 43-story Lamaku and the 32-story Mamalu, delivering around 859 residences in one-, two-, and three-bedroom layouts plus live/work lofts, with a meaningful share reserved under Honolulu's affordable- and workforce-housing programs and the balance market-rate. Designed by Alakea Design Group with Benjamin Woo Architects as architect of record, the project pairs contemporary glass-and-concrete towers with resort-style amenities such as a pool deck and landscaped terraces, set above roughly 35,000 square feet of ground-floor retail and a public market. Its central location puts residents steps from SALT at Our Kakaʻako, Ward Village, and Ala Moana Center.
Architect: Alakea Design Group, Benjamin Woo Architects

StatusHistory.note: Kamehameha Schools selects Stanford Carr Development for the 859-unit two-tower Kahuina project at Our Kakaʻako, 2022-03-24
Kahuina is in the Our Kakaʻako district, Honolulu

Title: Ālia
Description: A 400-foot luxury condominium tower in Honolulu's Our Kakaʻako district, distinguished by a sustainability-forward, trade-wind-oriented design and one of Hawaii's most ambitious all-electric residential programs.
DescriptionLong: Rising 39 residential stories atop a five-story podium at 888 Ala Moana Boulevard, Ālia is a roughly 400-foot luxury condominium tower anchoring Block I of Honolulu's Our Kakaʻako master plan, a partnership of the Kobayashi Group and The MacNaughton Group on Kamehameha Schools land. Designed by San Francisco's WRNS Studio with interiors by The Vanguard Theory, the building is oriented to the trade winds with an undulating south façade and alternating floor-to-floor lanais that provide passive shading, cooling, and sweeping ocean and Diamond Head views. Its roughly 457 residences range from reserved-housing and market-rate one-bedrooms to two-bedroom lofts and three-bedroom homes, served by amenities including two infinity pools, a bowling alley, a movie theater, a pickleball court, and human and pet spas. One of the most sustainability-driven residential towers in Hawaii, Ālia is an all-electric building with a centralized chilled-water system, an extensive rooftop photovoltaic array, and the first greywater treatment system in a Hawaiian residential high-rise.

StatusHistory.note: $400M Ālia tower (Kobayashi Group) reported under construction in Our Kakaʻako per Construction Dive, 2024-06
Ālia is in the Our Kakaʻako district on Ala Moana Blvd, Honolulu

Title: Kaliʻu
Description: A roughly 400-foot luxury condominium tower in Honolulu's Our Kakaʻako district, set on a full block beside SALT at Our Kakaʻako, pairing nearly 300 residences with ground-floor retail.
DescriptionLong: Kaliʻu is a 39-story, roughly 400-foot mixed-use luxury condominium tower rising on Block G of the Kamehameha Schools-master-planned Our Kakaʻako neighborhood, occupying a full city block bordered by Ala Moana Boulevard and Cooke, Auahi, and Coral Streets, immediately beside the award-winning SALT at Our Kakaʻako. Developed by ProsPac Holdings with architecture by Honolulu-based Design Partners Inc. and interiors by Seattle's Olson Kundig, the tower offers roughly 294 one-, two-, and three-bedroom residences atop a podium with parking and about 40,000 square feet of street-level commercial space planned for a grocery store, shops, and restaurants. A sixth-floor amenity deck of nearly 40,000 square feet anchors the project's wellness focus, with an infinity pool, fitness center, spa, and pickleball court. The name Kaliʻu, meaning "well-seasoned" in Hawaiian, honors the salt-bed heritage of the surrounding lands.

StatusHistory.note: ProsPac's Kaliʻu (400-ft Kakaʻako tower) advances with HCDA approval, 2023-11-02
Kaliʻu is in Our Kakaʻako beside SALT, Honolulu

Title: InterContinental Turks & Caicos
Description: An all-suite, seven-story beachfront InterContinental on Grace Bay in The Bight, Providenciales, marking IHG's luxury debut in Turks and Caicos.
DescriptionLong: The InterContinental Turks & Caicos is a seven-story, all-suite luxury beachfront resort on Grace Bay in The Bight area of Providenciales, with 59 spacious suites each offering panoramic ocean views. Designed to exude approachable sophistication, it includes a ground-floor restaurant and bar, an outdoor pool, an on-site fitness center, and the brand's signature Club InterContinental lounge. It is one of three adjacent IHG resorts on the site — developed by the family-owned Molo Hotel Group with UK-based Lighthouse Hotel Management — brought to life by Glasgow-based architecture and interior studio Ica in partnership with Turks & Caicos-based Conservative Architecture and Miami landscape firm EDSA. The InterContinental anchors the upscale end of a three-brand cluster that also includes a Kimpton and a Hotel Indigo, together representing IHG's entry into the Turks and Caicos market.
Developer: Molo Hotel Group, Lighthouse Hotel Management

StatusHistory.note: IHG marks Turks & Caicos debut, signing InterContinental (with Kimpton & Hotel Indigo) with owner Molo Hotel Group, 2024-05-20
InterContinental Turks & Caicos = 59 all-suite keys, 7 stories, Grace Bay (Providenciales)
InterContinental Turks & Caicos = 59 all-suite keys, 7 stories, Grace Bay (Providenciales)

Title: AMARIS Grace Bay
Description: A beachfront luxury resort and branded residences on Grace Bay Beach in Providenciales, operating under Hilton's LXR Hotels & Resorts portfolio.
DescriptionLong: A mixed-use beachfront retreat rising directly on the turquoise shoreline of Grace Bay Beach in Providenciales, AMARIS Grace Bay joins Hilton's ultra-luxury LXR Hotels & Resorts collection. The property pairs guest rooms and suites with branded residences ranging from studios to four-bedroom homes, several configured with lock-out layouts for rental flexibility, each oriented to frame sweeping bay views. The contemporary Caribbean design draws on the tones and textures of its surroundings, using tactile materials such as woven fabrics and polished wood to blur the line between interior and outdoors. Amenities include two specialty restaurants — an Aegean-meets-Caribbean beachfront concept and a Japanese grill with an omakase counter — signature bars, an expansive spa and fitness center, infinity pools with beach service, event space, and a kids' club and game room, complemented by LXR's experiential programming and Hilton Honors benefits.

StatusHistory.note: Hilton signs AMARIS Grace Bay into LXR Hotels & Resorts (170 keys + branded residences) on Grace Bay Beach, 2025-12-16

Title: The Cayden Olde Naples
Description: An exclusive boutique condominium of just six residences on 9th Street South in the heart of Olde Naples, blocks from Fifth Avenue South and within a mile of the Gulf beaches.
DescriptionLong: The Cayden is an intimate three-story boutique condominium offering only six private residences at the corner of 9th Street South in Olde Naples, on the site of the former Contessa building. The roughly 0.75-acre development blends coastal-contemporary design with mixed-use ground-floor space and luxury homes above, ranging from two-bedroom layouts to three-bedroom-plus-den plans of about 1,650 to 2,250 square feet, each with a private garage and balconies overlooking the pool or downtown. Its signature amenity is an oversized rooftop oasis with a pool and hot tub, lounge and shaded dining areas, and built-in grilling stations, complemented by an on-site fitness center, community room, secured mailroom, and a dog run. Buyers have the rare opportunity to collaborate directly with the builders on interior finishes, in a walkable setting minutes from the dining, shopping, and arts of Fifth Avenue South.

StatusHistory.note: The Cayden, a 6-residence boutique condo over ground-floor commercial in Olde Naples (180 9th St S), came to market in 2024; completion targeted early 2026

Title: Epique at Pelican Bay
Description: An ultra-luxury Gulf-front high-rise in Naples' Pelican Bay — the community's final new-construction ownership tower, with 68 bespoke residences overlooking the Gulf of Mexico.
DescriptionLong: Epique at Pelican Bay is a boutique ultra-luxury high-rise developed by Gulf Bay with concept architecture by Naples-based MHK Architecture & Planning, marking the last new-construction tower within the Pelican Bay community. Set directly along the Gulf of Mexico between the Mystique and St. Laurent towers, it holds 68 Gulf-front residences across 18 floors — Estates, SkyEstates, Jardin garden residences, and penthouses — with plans ranging from roughly 4,000 to over 5,200 square feet under air. Interiors feature ten-foot ceilings, floor-to-ceiling sliders, natural stone and wood flooring, sunset terraces with outdoor kitchens, and chef's kitchens with Wolf, Sub-Zero, and Miele appliances and imported cabinetry. An extensive amenity program is anchored by a private dining club with full bar and indoor and al fresco dining and a rooftop pool destination, complemented by a health and fitness center, steam rooms, treatment rooms, club and parlor rooms, a salon, library, solarium, theater, and billiards — all within Pelican Bay's private beach, dining, and recreation lifestyle.

StatusHistory.note: Epique at Pelican Bay sales launched March 2022 — final approved high-rise in Pelican Bay (Gulf Bay Group)

Title: Rosewood Residences Naples
Description: An ultra-low-density beachfront luxury condominium on Gulf Shore Boulevard in Naples' Coquina Sands, with 42 residences and residential services curated by Rosewood Hotels & Resorts.
DescriptionLong: Set on a roughly 5.25-acre Gulf-front parcel with nearly 500 feet of private beachfront, Rosewood Residences Naples comprises 42 expansive residences across two seven-story buildings on the former Mansion House site. Floor plans range from roughly 4,200 to more than 9,700 square feet as three- to six-bedroom layouts and penthouses, each served by private and service elevators. Designed by Naples-based MHK Architecture with interiors by New York's Lillian Wu Studio, the property features a porte cochère with a commissioned steel sculpture, a grand staircase beneath a custom chandelier, two pools with shaded cabanas, fire-pit lounges, bocce courts, gated entry with around-the-clock security and valet, and multiple points of beachfront access. Residential services are operated by Rosewood Hotels & Resorts, including a Rosewood Reserve membership granting VIP access at Rosewood properties worldwide.
Developer: The Ronto Group, Wheelock Street Capital

StatusHistory.note: Rosewood announces Rosewood Residences Naples (Ronto Group / Wheelock) on Gulf Shore Blvd, 2022-05-12
$234M construction loan (JLL-arranged, Apollo affiliates) closes for Rosewood Residences Naples, 2024-08-26
The Ronto Group commences construction of Rosewood Residences Naples, 2024-09-06
Rosewood Residences Naples tops off, 2025-08-01 (per Gulfshore Business)

Title: Tributer Resort
Description: A golf and residential resort community on Virginia's Lake Anna anchored by two championship courses — including a new Tiger Woods / TGR Design layout — plus villas, cottages, and nearly 900 planned residences.
DescriptionLong: Tributer Resort is a golf and residential destination by Reef Capital Partners set above the shores of Lake Anna in central Virginia, near Mineral. The community is anchored by championship golf: its existing private course, Cutalong Golf Club, was named one of Golf Digest's Top 5 Best New Private Courses in the United States in 2023, a layout inspired by National Golf Links of America and the Golden Age principles of C.B. MacDonald, Donald Ross, and Alister MacKenzie. A second private, 18-hole championship course designed by Tiger Woods' TGR Design is now planned, playing to 7,310 yards through rolling farmland, hardwood forests, and pine groves overlooking the lake. Alongside the golf sits the Shenandoah Green, a lighted 18-hole putting course, and a clubhouse overlooking the 1st tee and 18th green that houses Coopers, the resort's signature dining venue and golf shop. The residential collection includes homesites, four-bedroom Golf Villas, and two-bedroom Golf Cottages — member-owned, with select homes available to guests through Stay & Play reservations — built in a style that marries traditional Virginia design with contemporary comfort. Once complete, the community will grow to nearly 900 residences alongside additional chef-driven dining, sports courts, wellness amenities, pool and lakeside recreation, and trail systems.

StatusHistory.note: Cutalong golf clubhouse opens and Phase 1 villas/cottages break ground at Tributer Resort, Lake Anna, 2025-08

Title: Nobu Hotel Lisbon
Description: Nobu's first hotel and restaurant in Portugal, on Avenida da Liberdade, bringing the brand's Japanese-Peruvian dining and minimalist luxury to central Lisbon.
DescriptionLong: Nobu Hotel Lisbon will be the first Nobu hotel and restaurant in Portugal, set on the famed Avenida da Liberdade in the heart of the city. The address — renowned for its luxury boutiques and distinct 19th-century architecture — places guests within a short walk of the Baixa district, the Chiado neighborhood, and São Jorge Castle, with direct access to upscale retail, dining, and cultural landmarks. The property brings the brand's signature blend of modern luxury and minimalist Japanese tradition founded by chef Nobu Matsuhisa, Robert De Niro, and Meir Teper, anchored by a Nobu restaurant delivering the label's celebrated Japanese-Peruvian cuisine. It marks Nobu Hospitality's entry into Portugal as part of the group's European growth.

StatusHistory.note: Nobu Hospitality announces its first Portugal hotel + restaurant on Avenida da Liberdade (with Milenium Hospitality), 2023-05-22

Title: Six Senses Lisbon
Description: A 114-room Six Senses wellness hotel set across two restored 17th- and 18th-century palaces near the Elevador do Lavra, with a 1,000-square-meter spa and rooftop bar.
DescriptionLong: Six Senses Lisbon is the wellness brand's first urban hotel in Portugal's capital, set across two restored heritage palaces in the city center beside the historic Elevador do Lavra funicular. The 17th-century Palácio Lavra and the Palácio de Pedrosas — the latter built in 1764 for an Italian merchant and later owned by the Portuguese postal service — are woven together into a single property of 114 guestrooms, blending exposed classic architecture and traditional Portuguese furniture with a contemporary, light-filled sensibility. Many suites feature fitted kitchens and outdoor terraces, while communal spaces include a rooftop terrace with city views and a private central garden of vine-covered glass atriums. In keeping with the brand's wellness-led ethos, the hotel centers on a roughly 1,000-square-meter Six Senses Spa with eight treatment rooms, indoor and outdoor wet areas, a fitness center, a dance studio, and a yoga pavilion, alongside a rooftop bar, library, boutique, Earth Lab, and several dining concepts. Steps from the Coliseu and Politeama theaters and a short walk from Avenida da Liberdade, it pairs urban energy with secluded calm.
Developer: Key International, ARD Investment and Development

StatusHistory.note: Six Senses signs Lisbon hotel across the 17th-c. Palácio Lavra and Palácio das Pedrosas, 2021-11
Six Senses Lisbon = 114 keys across Palácio Lavra + Palácio das Pedrosas, near Avenida da Liberdade

Title: JNcQUOI House
Description: An intimate 17-suite luxury townhouse hotel on Avenida da Liberdade, set in a restored 1891 neo-Moorish building, with two restaurants, a speakeasy bar, and a boutique gym.
DescriptionLong: JNcQUOI House is an intimate luxury townhouse hotel opening on Avenida da Liberdade, Lisbon's most prestigious address, from the Amorim Luxury Group. Set within a building originally constructed in 1891 by lawyer Adriano Antão Barata Salgueiro, the House preserves its distinctive late-19th-century neo-Moorish architecture while layering in a contemporary sensibility shaped by Belgian architect Vincent Van Duysen. The hotel holds 17 Grand Suites — a mix of Kiosk Rooms, Avenue Rooms, and a Mansard penthouse suite — each conceived as a private retreat with open-concept living areas and richly detailed finishes. Two restaurants, an exclusive speakeasy bar, and a boutique gym round out the property, and guests become members of the wider JNcQUOI community, with access to the group's collection of restaurants and Fashion Clinic lifestyle destinations across Lisbon and Comporta. Steps from Chiado, Marquês de Pombal, and Eduardo VII Park, it sits at the heart of the city's luxury quarter.

StatusHistory.note: Amorim Luxury reveals JNcQUOI House, its first hotel, on Avenida da Liberdade (€10M), 2021-04
